channel.title: Webapplication on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Webapplication on Arrans github.io

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: TannerMidd/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.
